rationale.R1.5: The output proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not mark confidence or missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on the scoring metric and architecture inventory rather than the benchmark structure.
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors by committing to a single composite scoring metric without discussing alternative aggregations.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
